response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development and leadership, with strong skills in distributed systems and cloud technologies. However, his background lacks direct experience with C++ at the required 8-year level (his most recent C++ work was in 2015) and he has limited experience in technical leadership roles (no explicit cloud/DevOps mentoring). His architecture experience is strong but not explicitly in large-scale cloud compute platforms.
strengths: Extensive experience in distributed systems and low-latency applications using Dlang and C++
Proven track record in technical leadership and mentoring (e.g., TDD workshops, Refactoring Dojos)
Strong cloud and DevOps experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant work in 2015, does not meet 8-year requirement)
No explicit experience in technical leadership roles (cloud/DevOps mentoring)
Lacks direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platform architecture and strategy
